Nova Craft

We're taking you back a billion years to the dawn of creation. Armed with only four basic elements—fire, water, earth, and air. You'll start the Big Bang from scratch. In this alchemy game, combine elements to create new ones and see history unfold.

Play Nova Craft Online

Loading game...
About Nova Craft

We're taking you back a billion years to the dawn of creation. Armed with only four basic elements—fire, water, earth, and air. You'll start the Big Bang from scratch. In this alchemy game, combine elements to create new ones and see history unfold. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Nova Craft in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Nova Craft for free?

Yes. Nova Craft is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Nova Craft?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
